name: netflix-devops
description: Netflix-like streaming application with DevOps infrastructure

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=netflix-auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=netflix-backend" "npm run dev --workspace=netflix-frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=netflix-video-service"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=netflix-auth-service && npm run build --workspace=netflix-backend && npm run build --workspace=netflix-frontend && npm run build --workspace=netflix-video-service
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=netflix-auth-service && npm run test --workspace=netflix-backend && npm run test --workspace=netflix-frontend && npm run test --workspace=netflix-video-service
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=netflix-auth-service && npm run test:coverage --workspace=netflix-backend && npm run test:coverage --workspace=netflix-frontend && npm run test:coverage --workspace=netflix-video-service
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=netflix-auth-service && npm run lint --workspace=netflix-backend && npm run lint --workspace=netflix-frontend && npm run lint --workspace=netflix-video-service
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=netflix-auth-service && npm run format --workspace=netflix-backend && npm run format --workspace=netflix-frontend && npm run format --workspace=netflix-video-service

author: DevOps Team
